claim: The 'grill me' skill relentlessly asks questions and checkpoints answers to a doc, raising initial skill quality from ~70% to ~90% on first attempt
actionable: Use the grill me skill to extract domain knowledge before building a new skill; spend 4 hours interviewing instead of 30 iterations refining
source_title: The Skill That 10x'd My Claude Code Projects

claim: Front-loading context through structured interviews enables skills to achieve 90% quality on iteration 1 instead of plateauing near 70% and iterating 30+ times
actionable: Spend time upfront extracting knowledge via structured prompts; invest early context gathering saves exponential iteration downstream
source_title: The Skill That 10x'd My Claude Code Projects

claim: Checkpointing after each question during grill-me sessions prevents context window overflow from losing earlier answers on long conversations
actionable: Add checkpointing to interview skills; write answers to docs after each question to maintain memory across long conversations
source_title: The Skill That 10x'd My Claude Code Projects

claim: Brainstorm docs can be revisited and updated when business processes evolve; grill-me sessions scale from learning a new process to refining existing ones
actionable: Use brainstorm docs as living documentation; re-run grill-me when major process changes occur to update skills and operational guidelines
source_title: The Skill That 10x'd My Claude Code Projects
